parsedJson.summary: The page clearly identifies the business and phone number, but the hero design feels dated and makes the main action less direct than it should be for a Brisbane roofing customer.

issues.title: Hero image looks faded and low-impact
issues.what_observed: The main roof photo is heavily washed out with a pale white overlay and blurred background, making the house and roof difficult to inspect.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching local customer wants quick confidence that this roofer does real, solid roof work in Brisbane. When the main image looks faded and unclear, the business feels less current and less tangible.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sharp, high-resolution Brisbane roof project photo with natural contrast, visible roof detail, and a subtle dark or light overlay only behind the text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the washed-out hero with a crisp completed roof replacement photo, keep the roof surface clearly visible, and place the headline in a clean text area with controlled contrast.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图太白、太模糊，客户看不清你们做出来的屋顶效果。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地客户会在几秒内判断这家公司靠不靠谱。如果第一眼看不到真实清楚的施工效果，尤其是来自 Google 商家资料的访客，可能会直接返回去点下一家。

issues.title: Hero headline feels dated
issues.what_observed: The headline 'BRISBANE ROOF REPLACEMENTS' is set in large orange all-caps text with thin horizontal rules and a geometric translucent panel behind it.
issues.why_problem: The styling feels like an older template rather than a current trade business site. For a high-cost roof replacement, visitors often read visual polish as a sign of business care and professionalism.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simpler headline such as 'Roof Replacement in Brisbane' in dark navy or charcoal, with one strong supporting line and a single high-contrast call button beneath it.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the decorative horizontal rules and angular overlay, rewrite the hero as a plain service-location headline, and use a modern type scale with stronger contrast.
issues.plain_explanation: 标题样式看起来像旧模板，不像现在专业公司的网站。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶更换是高价服务，客户会更谨慎。页面看起来旧，会让人担心公司是否也不够规范，从而降低来电和询盘。

issues.title: Main action is visually split
issues.what_observed: There is a coral 'BOOK YOUR FREE ROOF CONSULTATION' bar across the top and a second smaller coral 'BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION' button in the hero.
issues.why_problem: The two similar calls to action compete for attention instead of making the next step obvious. A local-search visitor may pause to scan instead of immediately calling or booking.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One dominant above-the-fold action: a large phone button or 'Get a Free Roof Quote' button, supported by a secondary text link only if needed.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use one primary coral CTA in the hero, make the phone number a clear click-to-call action, and reduce the top coral banner to a smaller utility link or remove it.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上同时出现两个相似的预约按钮，客户不知道应该先看哪里。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索客户通常想快速打电话或获取报价。选择太分散会增加犹豫，几秒钟的犹豫就可能让客户回到 Google 选择竞争对手。

issues.title: Phone number lacks action emphasis
issues.what_observed: The phone number '1300 734 148' appears large in the top-right, but it is separated from the hero action and presented as static header text.
issues.why_problem: For urgent roofing needs, many visitors want to call immediately. If the number does not look like the primary action, some people will look around longer or miss the fastest contact path.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A prominent click-to-call button reading 'Call 1300 734 148' in the header and repeated in the hero, with strong contrast and enough spacing around it.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Convert the header number into a clear phone CTA button, add a phone icon inside the button, and repeat a call-focused CTA near the hero headline.
issues.plain_explanation: 电话号码虽然很大，但不像一个明显可以马上点击或拨打的按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 很多屋顶客户，特别是漏水或紧急维修客户，会优先打电话。电话入口不够明显，会减少直接来电。

issues.title: Navigation feels crowded
issues.what_observed: The blue navigation bar contains many equally weighted items: Services, Gallery, Roof Colour Chart, Blog, E-Library, About, Careers, Contact, plus search.
issues.why_problem: A new visitor looking for a roofer can be distracted by secondary links like Blog, E-Library, and Careers before seeing the most useful paths: services, proof, and contact.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter nav focused on Services, Projects, Reviews, About, and Contact, with quote and phone actions visually separated.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the main navigation to the five highest-intent links and move Blog, E-Library, Careers, and search into the footer or a secondary menu.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部菜单项目太多，重要的联系和服务入口被一堆次要内容挤在一起。
issues.customer_impact: 客户从 Google 点进来通常只想确认服务、看案例、联系报价。菜单太杂会拖慢决定过程，降低咨询机会。

issues.title: Floating social buttons look old
issues.what_observed: A dark vertical strip with Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube icons floats on the right side of the hero.
issues.why_problem: The floating social strip looks dated and pulls attention away from calling or booking. The Twitter icon also feels less relevant for choosing a local roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Social proof should appear as review stars, project photos, licenses, or testimonials near the hero, with social links placed quietly in the footer.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the floating social bar and replace that attention with Google review rating, years in business, warranty, or license/insurance trust badges above the fold.
issues.plain_explanation: 右侧悬浮社交按钮显得过时，而且会分散客户对电话和报价按钮的注意力。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不是来逛社交媒体的，是来找靠谱屋顶公司的。把注意力浪费在社交图标上，会削弱询价和来电。

positive_observations: The Roo Roofing logo is large and easy to recognize in the header.
The phone number is visible above the fold on desktop.
The page clearly mentions Brisbane roof replacements, matching local search intent.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the faded hero with a sharp real roof project photo and clearer service-location headline.
2. Make phone and quote actions the dominant above-the-fold choices.
3. Simplify navigation and replace floating social icons with stronger trust signals.
